zh.lifeSummary: 當Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn於大約1278年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn22歲，母親Egidia Agnes Comyn35歲。他於1315年與Margery Ross在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和15個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年在蘇格蘭奧可尼享年52歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn于大约1278年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn22岁，母亲Egidia Agnes Comyn35岁。他于1315年与Margery Ross在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和15个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年在苏格兰奧可尼享年52岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Malise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Salvatore, Gaetano, Angelo, Antonio, Domenic, Sal, Aniello, Attilio, Carlo, Carmela, Concetta.
Italian (Sicily and Naples): perhaps from Arabickhalīṣ ‘pure, sincere’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn was born about 1278, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, was 22 and his mother, Egidia Agnes Comyn, was 35. He married Margery Ross in 1315, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 15 daughters. He died in 1329, in Orkney, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn est né environ 1278, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Egidia Agnes Comyn, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margery Ross en 1315, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 15 filles. Il est décédé en 1329, à Orkney, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland: Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn um 1278 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn 22 und seine Mutter Egidia Agnes Comyn 35. Er hat 1315 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margery Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Er starb 1329 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Orkney, Scotland und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn è nato il circa 1278 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Egidia Agnes Comyn, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margery Ross nel 1315, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 15 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel Orkney, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearnが約1278年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearnは22歳，母Egidia Agnes Comynは35歳であった。1315年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでMargery Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年にスコットランドオルクニーで52歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn(이)가 대략 1278년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Egidia Agnes Comyn(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Margery Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 스컷랜드 르니에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Agnes Comyn, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Ross em 1315, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 15 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1329, em Orkney, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn родился около 1278 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Egidia Agnes Comyn, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Ross в 1315 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 15 дочерей. Он умер в 1329 г. в местности орни, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn nació aproximadamente 1278, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Malise Strathearn Earl of Strathearn, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Egidia Agnes Comyn, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margery Ross en 1315, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 15 hijas. Murió en 1329, en Orkney, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
